_comment: Consumer binding emitted from 30-task.yaml per references/output-formats.md. One tool per leaf L2 task. Adyen preconditions (manual-capture state, pre-capture-only cancel, defense deadline, irreversibility) are folded into each description so the agent won't make an illegal call.

tools.name: capture_payment
tools.description: Capture an authorised payment, fully or partially. Preconditions: payment is authorised and NOT yet captured (merchant account uses manual capture); capture amount <= authorised amount and same currency. Effects: Capture created (received -> success/failed); on a single partial capture the unclaimed remainder is auto-cancelled.

amount_value.description: MonetaryAmount (L1) in minor units; omit for full capture

tools.name: refund_payment
tools.description: Refund captured funds to the shopper, fully or partially. Preconditions: payment has been captured; refund amount <= captured-and-not-yet-refunded remainder. Effect: Refund created; funds returned to the shopper.

paymentPspReference.description: Payment (L1) — the captured payment to refund

amount_value.description: MonetaryAmount (L1) in minor units; omit for full refund

tools.name: cancel_payment
tools.description: Cancel (void) an authorised payment BEFORE it is captured. Precondition: payment is authorised and has NOT been captured — after capture you must use refund_payment instead. Effect: authorisation voided; no funds settle.

paymentPspReference.description: Payment (L1) — the uncaptured authorisation to void

tools.name: retrieve_defense_reasons
tools.description: List the defense reason codes applicable to a dispute. Read-only — no funds move. Call this before defend_dispute to obtain a valid defenseReasonCode.

tools.name: supply_defense_document
tools.description: Upload an evidence document to contest a dispute. Preconditions: content type is JPG, TIFF, or PDF and within the size limit; dispute is defensible (notification of chargeback received). Effect: document attached to the dispute defense.

tools.name: defend_dispute
tools.description: Submit a defense for a chargeback under a chosen reason code. Preconditions: dispute has reached NOTIFICATION_OF_CHARGEBACK (defense period open); defenseReasonCode is one of the applicable reasons (call retrieve_defense_reasons first); before the defense deadline. Effect: defense submitted to the issuer for review.

defenseReasonCode.description: DefenseReason (L1) — must be in the applicable set

tools.name: accept_dispute
tools.description: Concede a dispute without defending it. Precondition: dispute is open. Effects: funds conceded to the cardholder; IRREVERSIBLE — confirm with a human before calling.

tools.name: monitor_payout
tools.description: Check settlement of captured funds to the merchant account. Read-only — no funds move. Reports settled payouts for the account.
